commit.message:
Fix CS0315 for non-IUtf8SpanFormattable types (bool, enum, custom structs) (#16)

* Fix CS0315 for non-IUtf8SpanFormattable types (bool, enum, custom structs)

Resolve SerializationKind per parameter at classification time by checking
IUtf8SpanFormattable on the type symbol. Bool emits zero-alloc UTF-8
literals, other non-formattable types fall back to WriteString(ToString()).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Make generator model types internal

All Models/ types and SerializationKind are generator-internal and should
not be part of the public API surface.

commit.message:
fix: global aircraft coverage, stable tracking angle, guaranteed brackets

aircraft.js:
- fetchAirplanesLive: round-robin interleave the 3 regions so Americas no
  longer dominates the list; any remaining cap cuts equally across all continents
- updateAircraft: render full response (no geographic slice); MAX_RENDER=6000
  is only enforced if response actually exceeds that size

hud.js:
- Aircraft tracking: replace viewer.trackedEntity with postRender camera.lookAt
  (heading=0°, pitch=-55°, range=100km). lookAt points the camera AT the plane
  every frame, so: (1) stable top-down angle regardless of plane direction,
  (2) entity is mathematically at screen center → worldToWindowCoordinates always
  returns a valid pixel → orange selection brackets are always drawn
- Satellites: keep flyTo(700km) + trackedEntity (appropriate for orbital objects)
- releaseTracking() helper cleanly removes the postRender listener and calls
  lookAtTransform(IDENTITY) to restore free-camera navigation on deselect/Escape
- Guard in complete() callback prevents stale flyTo from engaging tracking if
  the user deselected or switched targets during the 1.5s animation

commit.message:
feat: session-gated crons with reduced frequencies and catch-up on load

Crons are now no-ops when no user has visited in the last 30 minutes:
- New lib/session-gate.ts: KV-backed heartbeat tracking (fail-open)
- New /api/heartbeat: frontend pings on load + every 5 min
- New /api/catchup: triggers bulk ingest + brief refresh on first visit
- HeartbeatProvider in root layout sends heartbeats automatically
- All 6 cron handlers check isSessionActive() before doing work

Frequency reductions (132 -> ~90 invocations/hour when active):
- Flights: */5 -> */15
- X/Twitter + gov sources: */10 -> */15
- Low-priority sources: */15 -> */30
- Bulk ingest: */30 -> hourly (safety net only)

commit.message:
Add bounce handling and unsubscribe system

- Migration: bounced_at, unsubscribed_at, last_replied_at on all 4 contact tables; adds 'delayed' status to recipient CHECK constraints
- email-suppression.ts: shared utility for applyBounceToEmail, applyUnsubscribeToEmail, applyReplyToEmail, buildUnsubscribeToken, decodeUnsubscribeToken
- Webhook: handles all 9 Resend events (failed, delivery_delayed, suppressed, received) + marks source contacts on bounce/complaint/suppression
- POST /api/admin/sync-bounces: fetches Resend suppressions API and marks all contact tables
- POST /api/admin/process-bounces-csv: CSV upload fallback for bounce marking
- POST /api/unsubscribe: decodes HMAC token, marks recipient suppressed, applies global unsubscribe
- GET /unsubscribe: public page with success/error states, auto-processes token on load
- /dashboard/settings/bounces: Sync from Resend button + CSV upload with result summaries
- All 3 send routes: inject signed unsubscribe footer after sender signature
- Outreach campaign creation: filter bounced_at IS NULL and unsubscribed_at IS NULL from contact query
- RecipientStatus type: add 'delayed'

commit.message:
Fix venue map export: cache-bust CORS image request

Browser was serving the cached non-CORS version of the image when
the export tried to reload it with crossOrigin:'anonymous', causing
the CORS check to fail silently. Adding a timestamp query parameter
forces a fresh request with proper CORS headers.

commit.message:
Fix 7 HuMo quality bugs found in full reference audit

Critical:
- Fix pixel range conversion: VAE outputs [-1,1] but code clamped [0,1],
  destroying half the dynamic range (dark regions became pure black)
- Fix audio temporal truncation: Whisper pads to 30s but we never truncated,
  so ~87% of audio features for a 3.88s clip were zero-padding garbage
- Fix zero_vae: encode full 97-frame black video instead of single frame,
  since causal 3D VAE produces position-dependent latent values

High:
- Fix audio interpolation align_corners=True to match original HuMo
- Add Chinese negative prompt from original HuMo inference config

Medium:
- Fix image resize to preserve aspect ratio with white padding
- Fix Whisper to run in float32 (was using model dtype, possibly fp16)

commit.message:
Add friend challenge system

Backend:
- challenges table (challenge_id, challenger_username, scene_id, score_to_beat)
- POST /api/challenge — creates a challenge link, returns short hex ID + URL
- GET /api/challenge/{id} — returns challenge details (public, no auth)
- GET /challenge/{id} — SPA route: serves index.html so JS handles routing

Frontend:
- URL routing in boot: detects /challenge/[id] path, loads challenge screen
- #challengeScreen — full-page challenge card showing challenger, score, movie
- "Accept Challenge" button opens scene modal with challengeCtx set
- After scoring: showChallengeResult() shows YOU WON / So close overlay
- "⚔ Challenge a Friend" button in score panel → POST to create challenge
- Share panel: copy link + WhatsApp share button
- Login/register from challenge page flows back into challenge after auth

commit.message:
refactor: remove functor_accepts_by_value introspection from dispatch

Remove the functor parameter type introspection machinery
(functor_accepts_by_value, pass_nd_t, repr_opt_type_helper_impl,
opt_type) from dispatch.hpp. This simplifies arg_pass to only use
caller-allows-copy semantics (rvalue refs and const lvalue refs).

The removed code was a micro-optimization for the niche case where a
non-const lvalue ref argument could be passed by value because the
functor's signature proved no output semantics. Benchmarks show zero
performance regression and identical binary sizes.

Also fix readability-math-missing-parentheses warning in dynamic_for.hpp.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: cutover follow-ups — signal receive, port binding, example config (#515)

## Summary

Three fixes discovered during the Node→Rust production cutover:

- **Signal receive RPC**: Remove `account` parameter from `receive()`
call — signal-cli 0.13.23 only accepts `maxMessages` and `timeout`,
causing "Unrecognized field account" errors
- **CLI port binding**: Make `--port` optional so `config.gateway.port`
from YAML is respected when the flag isn't explicitly passed (previously
the clap default always won)
- **Example config**: Fix `aletheia.yaml.example` to use camelCase field
names matching `#[serde(rename_all = "camelCase")]` on all taxis structs
(snake_case was silently ignored)

## Test plan

- [x] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` — zero
warnings
- [x] `cargo test -p aletheia-agora -p aletheia -p aletheia-taxis` — 60
tests pass
- [x] `cli_defaults` test updated for `Option<u16>` port
- [ ] Verify on worker-node: signal polling works, port from config
respected

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: admin <admin@ardentleatherworks.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
